name: 7Zip Compressing Dump Filess
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Bahrain Duty Free, Health360, NOMAC, Array

when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%7-zip%' OR ((LOWER("Process Path") LIKE '%\7z.exe' OR LOWER("Process Path") LIKE '%\7zr.exe' OR LOWER("Process Path") LIKE '%\7za.exe') OR (LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\7z.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\7zr.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\7za.exe')) OR (Filename IN('7z.exe', '7za.exe'))) AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%.dmp%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%.dump%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%.hdmp%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY 7Zip Compressing Dump Filess on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Bahrain Duty Free, Health360, NOMAC, Array

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%7-zip%' OR ((LOWER("Process Path") LIKE '%\7z.exe' OR LOWER("Process Path") LIKE '%\7zr.exe' OR LOWER("Process Path") LIKE '%\7za.exe') OR (LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\7z.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\7zr.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\7za.exe')) OR (Filename IN('7z.exe', '7za.exe'))) AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%.dmp%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%.dump%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%.hdmp%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) SIGMA Title: 7Zip Compressing Dump Files SIGMA Description: Detects execution of 7z in order to compress a file with a ".dmp"/".dump" extension, which could be a step in a process of dump file exfiltration.  False positives: - Legitimate use of 7z with a command line in which ".dmp" or ".dump" appears accidentally - Legitimate use of 7z to compress WER ".dmp" files for troubleshooting  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
